payload.title: fix: update admin labels from 'Temples' to 'Hospital Facilities'
payload.body: Admin panel still shows 'Temples' in dashboard card and media context dropdown. Update labels to 'Hospital Facilities'. Admin URL path /admin/temples kept for backward compat with MySQL table name.

evidence: views/admin/dashboard.php: 'Manage astrologers, remote session requests, and temples'→'Manage sessions, hospital facilities, and appointments'
views/admin/dashboard.php: removed Astrologers link, Temples→Hospital Facilities link
views/admin/resource.php: collection check removed astrologers, data-field ternary simplified
